_comment: NFR-COMPAT-1: break_glass.enabled=false -> behaviour identical to today. git push -> blocked (exit 2), NO `Break-glass:` annotation on line 1, and verify-grant is NEVER invoked (0 overhead) even though a stub is on PATH. assert_verify_calls=0 proves the conditional-invocation guard.
